title: Oak Shaders
description: Oak Shaders offers realistic water and a calm, peaceful visual style, enhancing the overall atmosphere with smooth lighting and a naturally soothing theme.
body:
![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9e243c86efd493f2559da0be88f68135c5551d8_0.webp)

### ABOUT

Oak Shaders is designed to create a warm, peaceful Minecraft experience with a natural village vibe and soft, immersive lighting. It focuses on performance by avoiding waving foliage, ensuring higher FPS on most systems. The shader features wavy, realistic water, along with a highly realistic sun and moon that enhance the overall atmosphere. With its calm colors and cozy feel, Oak Shaders is perfect for players who want beauty without sacrificing performance.

[![SUB](https://i.imgur.com/dZlmo7I.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@GamesofDevYT)


### Features

- Customizable water with adjustable settings

- Color grading controls (saturation, brightness, and contrast)

- Toggleable bloom for a softer or cleaner look

- Performance-focused design for smooth gameplay

### How to report BUGS!!

Our GlacierDevelopment Discord server is Live you can report bugs and Chat with other GlacierShaders users, report bugs, get help with issues, and join exciting giveaways — all in one place!

[![DC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/215a7d97b2377683257df59401bc3d1a76ea75b4.png)](https://discord.gg/TpsGTtTnSm)
